name: NXMD (Hospital)
mission: To preserve life in the face of absolute chaos. Every life is worth attempting to save.
vision: To implement world-class medical roleplay utilizing advanced triage mechanics and immersive surgical systems.

basic: Neutrality is absolute; paramedics must never involve themselves in turf wars.
Never deny service based on a citizen's background or criminal record.
Scene safety first: wait for police clearance on active shootouts.
advanced: Major trauma requires transport to Pillbox Hill; field revivals are for minor injuries only.
Detailed medical logs must be kept for all major operations.
Do not utilize police radios unless declaring a 10-33.

roles.name: Chief of Medicine
roles.desc: Handles all hospital administration and policy.

roles.name: Surgeon
roles.desc: Capable of complex operative roleplay for major injuries.

roles.name: EMT Paramedic
roles.desc: First responders utilizing mobile triage units.

roles.name: Therapist
roles.desc: Dedicated psychological evaluations for high-stress jobs.
